summary: All 16 symbols appearing 1-2 times are intentional game mechanics, configuration data, or utility classes. None are dead code - they represent core game systems defined once and used in initialization or specific game mechanics.

symbols.name: SOUND_ENABLED
symbols.description: Boolean flag for enabling/disabling sound effects in the game. Used in SoundManager initialization.
symbols.reasoning: Intentional configuration constant that controls sound system functionality.

symbols.name: SOUND_VOLUME
symbols.description: Audio volume level (0-1) for sound effects. Used in SoundManager constructor to set initial volume.
symbols.reasoning: Essential game configuration for audio management.

symbols.name: MUSIC_VOLUME
symbols.description: Audio volume level (0-1) for background music. Used in MusicManager constructor.
symbols.reasoning: Essential game configuration for music management.

symbols.name: STATUS_EFFECTS
symbols.description: Data structure defining combat status effects (poisoned, burning, blessed, etc.) with damage/duration mechanics. Core to combat system.
symbols.reasoning: Fundamental game mechanic for combat status system. Defined once at module init, referenced in combat calculations.

symbols.name: DISEASES
symbols.description: Data structure for character diseases (plague, leprosy, mummy rot, etc.) with save DC and effects. Implements D&D 5e disease rules.
symbols.reasoning: Core gameplay mechanic for disease system. Defined once, used when applying/checking diseases.

symbols.name: MADNESS_EFFECTS
symbols.description: Data structure with madness effect descriptions (short-term, long-term, indefinite) for sanity mechanics. Implements D&D madness rules.
symbols.reasoning: Specialized D&D 5e game mechanic. Defined once, used when applying madness effects.

symbols.name: KEYBOARD_SHORTCUTS
symbols.description: Maps keyboard keys to in-game actions (attack, spell, defend, inventory, etc.). Used in keyboard event handler.
symbols.reasoning: Essential UI input mapping for gameplay controls.

symbols.name: DRAMATIC_DESCRIPTIONS
symbols.description: Arrays of flavor text for combat outcomes (critical hits, fumbles, kills). Enhances narrative experience.
symbols.reasoning: Intentional flavor/narrative system. Data-driven approach allows adding descriptions without code changes.

symbols.name: SoundManager
symbols.description: Class for managing sound effects via Web Audio API. Handles oscillator-based sound synthesis and playback control.
symbols.reasoning: Core utility class for game audio. Instantiated once as global singleton at initialization.

symbols.name: MusicManager
symbols.description: Class for managing background music and ambient soundscapes via Web Audio API. Controls music volume and state.
symbols.reasoning: Core utility class for background music. Instantiated once as global singleton at initialization (line 1725).

symbols.name: DiceAnimator
symbols.description: Class for animating dice rolls in UI. Creates and manages visual dice animation container.
symbols.reasoning: Visual effects utility for dice rolling animations. Instantiated once and used for all dice rolls in game.

symbols.name: WeatherRenderer
symbols.description: Class for rendering weather effects (rain, snow, storms, lightning) on canvas. Manages particle animations and visual effects.
symbols.reasoning: Visual effects system for environment. Instantiated once in Game initialization (line 6852) for weather display.

symbols.name: generateSaveKey
symbols.description: Generates unique save file keys combining prefix with timestamp. Used in save game functionality.
symbols.reasoning: Essential utility function for save game system. Called when creating new save slots.

symbols.name: CLASS_WEAPON_PROFICIENCY
symbols.description: D&D 5e character class weapon proficiency data. Maps each class to allowed weapon types (simple, martial, ranged, etc.).
symbols.reasoning: Core D&D mechanics. Referenced during character creation and combat to determine usable weapons (line 3769).

symbols.name: CLASS_TOOL_PROFICIENCY
symbols.description: D&D 5e character class tool proficiency data. Maps each class to allowed tool proficiencies for skill checks.
symbols.reasoning: Core D&D mechanics for character abilities. Used in character creation and skill resolution (line 4060).

symbols.name: FLAW_COMPLICATIONS
symbols.description: Character personality flaw mechanics triggered during interactions (sharp tongue disadvantage, reluctance to trust, etc.). Implements roleplay mechanics.
symbols.reasoning: Intentional character mechanics system. Used in dialogue/action callbacks to apply personality-based effects (line 5568).

keyFindings.status: ALL SYMBOLS ARE INTENTIONAL - No dead code detected
